rationale: Reveal every opaque spec fn the postcondition transitively touches and route the per-run pinned-field equalities through a functional-uniqueness helper lemma so z3 sees `next_get_request` and `host_state_common_postconditions` instantiated on identical syntactic `pre@ / pkt@` terms for both `r1` and `r2`. That lines up the five fields the relational body actually pins (delegation_map, h, num_delegations, constants, received_packet) into a shape z3 can use to close the abstract-state equality side of `det_..._equal`.
